title: Astra's Cypack
description: Just a resource pack that I have developed over the years.
body:
Works well in Vanilla but needs Optifine/Optifine Alternatives (Continuity, ETF, EMF, Etc..) for some features to work
- Adds Various texture changes.
- Bushy Leaves that works seemlessly with modded leaves (as long as the use the vanilla model).
- GUI is now a Purple/Orange gradient and has darker slots.

![A UI element showing off an orange/purple gradient.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae79957053fa670ef3c47b1c26f38bbf9c18ae4c.png)

![A page full of text showing the custom font.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa5d3e572d2a0fe5f888de898426421b2d9e4f64.png)
